name: Cheops Technology France SA
summary: Cheops Technology France SA provides information technology (IT) consulting services. It offers computer infrastructure designing, integration, and customization; data storage systems and servers consolidation; and infrastructure virtualization services. It also services for migrating and upgrading systems and applications. Additionally, the company offers information management services. Cheops Technology France SA was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Bordeaux, France.
